name: AutoGPT
description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

name: Feast
description: An open source feature store for machine learning.

name: Kubeflow
description: Machine Learning Toolkit for Kubernetes.

name: XGBoost
description: Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library.

name: AI-Infra-Guard
description: AI-Infra-Guard is an infrastructure security tool for AI systems.

name: ormb
description: Docker for Your ML/DL Models Based on OCI Artifacts

name: ChainForge
description: ChainForge is an open-source visual programming environment for battle-testing prompts to LLMs. Compare across models, prompts, and prompt parameters using built-in visualizations.

name: llm-d
description: llm-d is a Kubernetes-native high-performance distributed LLM inference framework

name: Pinecone
description: The Pinecone vector database makes it easy to build high-performance vector search applications. Developer-friendly, fully managed, and easily scalable without infrastructure hassles.

name: SimpleMem
description: SimpleMem is an efficient lifelong memory system for LLM agents that enables seamless memory retention and management across conversations.

name: Upgini
description: Free automated data & feature enrichment library for machine learning: automatically searches through thousands of ready-to-use features from public and community shared data sources and enriches your training dataset with only the accuracy improving features

name: Jupyter Notebooks
description: The Jupyter notebook is a web-based notebook environment for interactive computing.

name: REMBO
description: Bayesian optimization in high-dimensions via random embedding.

name: Plexiglass
description: A Python Machine Learning Pentesting Toolbox for Adversarial Attacks. Works with LLMs, DNNs, and other machine learning algorithms.

name: Weights & Biases
description: A developer first, lightweight, user-friendly experiment tracking and visualization tool for machine learning projects, streamlining collaboration and simplifying MLOps. W&B excels at tracking LLM-powered applications, featuring W&B Prompts for LLM execution flow visualization, input and output monitoring, and secure management of prompts and LLM chain configurations.

name: DSPy
description: DSPy is the framework for programming—not prompting—language models. It allows you to iterate fast on building modular AI systems and offers algorithms for optimizing prompts and weights.

name: x-stable-diffusion
description: Real-time inference for Stable Diffusion - 0.88s latency. Covers AITemplate, nvFuser, TensorRT, FlashAttention. (Archived)

name: pgvector
description: Open-source vector similarity search for Postgres.

name: OpenManus
description: No fortress, purely open ground. OpenManus is Coming.

name: FATE
description: An Industrial Grade Federated Learning Framework
